summary: Iteration 75: Whrrari LMSR 3 Sizing Modes Testing - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend: 16/16 tests pass. Frontend: All 3 mode cards (Unit-Size, Sandbox Notional, Crypto-Mirrored) displayed with correct labels and accents. All 7 data sub-tabs present. Config shows sandbox_bands and crypto_mirror_cap.

backend_api_tests: test_report_returns_unit_size_stats - PASS: unit_size stats object with pnl_total, win_rate, binary_win_rate, closed_trades, open_positions, open_exposure, pnl_per_trade, rolling_pnl
test_report_returns_crypto_mirrored_stats - PASS: crypto_mirrored stats object present
test_shadow_report_endpoint - PASS: GET /api/shadow/report still works (status=no_data - expected when no evaluations)
test_experiments_registry_endpoint - PASS: Whrrari in registry with status=active, shadow_sniper also present
frontend_ui_tests: Quant Lab page loads with data-testid='quant-lab-page' - PASS
Whrrari LMSR tab clickable and loads content - PASS
Unit-Size mode card (data-testid='wh-mode-unit') with 'Normalized Research' label - PASS
Sandbox Notional mode card (data-testid='wh-mode-sandbox') with 'Primary Promotion Metric' label (GREEN accent) - PASS
Crypto-Mirrored mode card (data-testid='wh-mode-crypto') with 'Hypothetical Stress Test' label (RED accent) - PASS
Config section shows sandbox_bands and crypto_mirror_cap - PASS
Engine Metrics section shows total_scans, groups_found, groups_evaluated, deviations_found - PASS

sandbox_notional.ui_card: data-testid='wh-mode-sandbox' with 'Primary Promotion Metric' label (GREEN accent)

crypto_mirrored.description: $3/signal accumulating to $25 cap, hypothetical stress test only
crypto_mirrored.ui_card: data-testid='wh-mode-crypto' with 'Hypothetical Stress Test' label (RED accent)

critical_code_review_comments: SANDBOX_BANDS constant correctly defines edge-tiered sizing: [(900.0, 15.0), (600.0, 8.0), (300.0, 3.0)]
Crypto-mirrored accumulation logic correctly caps at CRYPTO_MAX_POSITION ($25)
get_report() returns all 3 mode stats (unit_size, sandbox_notional, crypto_mirrored)
get_positions(mode) and get_closed(mode) correctly route to appropriate _ModeTracker
QuantLab.jsx WhrrariTab component correctly renders 3 WhrrariModeCard instances with proper styling
Sandbox card has green accent (border-emerald-500/25, ring-1 ring-emerald-500/30)
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live shadow engine data (1 scan, 1 group found, 0 hypothetical trades yet)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 validated the Whrrari LMSR 3 sizing modes feature. Key findings: (1) Backend correctly returns unit_size, sandbox_notional, and crypto_mirrored stats in /api/experiments/whrrari/report, (2) Config shows sandbox_bands='$3 (300-599bps) / $8 (600-899bps) / $15 (900+bps)' and crypto_mirror_cap='$3.0/signal → $25.0 max', (3) Position/closed endpoints accept ?mode=unit|sandbox|crypto query param, (4) Frontend shows 3 mode cards with correct labels: Unit-Size='Normalized Research', Sandbox Notional='Primary Promotion Metric' (green accent), Crypto-Mirrored='Hypothetical Stress Test' (red accent), (5) All 7 data sub-tabs present: Sandbox Open/Closed, Unit Open/Closed, Stress Open/Closed, Evaluations, (6) Existing shadow sniper and experiments registry still work. Engine currently has 1 scan, 1 group found, 0 hypothetical trades - sample size warning displayed as expected.
